commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Microsoft Teams welcome card heading to emit PascalCase `weight` and `size` values and adds a focused assertion for that payload.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +9. Total +11 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main emits lowercase heading values on the Teams welcome card path, while the Teams cards type contract and sibling builders use PascalCase. I did not run a live Teams renderer in this read-only review.
